features.description: Article and ArticleCategory database tables created in PostgreSQL
steps: Create article table with fields: id, title, content, summary, cover_image, category_id, author_id, status, is_top, view_count, like_count, and BaseEntity fields
Create article_category table with fields: id, category_name, sort_order, status, and BaseEntity fields
Verify SQL runs without errors against PostgreSQL

features.description: Article entity and ArticleCategory entity in domain layer
steps: Create Article entity extending BaseEntity with all article fields
Create ArticleCategory entity extending BaseEntity with all category fields
Entities follow existing naming conventions (MyBatis-Plus annotations)

features.description: Article gateway interfaces in domain layer
steps: Define custom query methods: selectArticlePage, countByCategoryId, etc.

features.description: Article mapper and gateway implementations in infrastructure layer
steps: Implement pagination query with title/categoryId/status filters
Create ArticlePageReq for pagination with filters
Create ArticleResp for article response data

features.description: Article service with business logic in application layer
steps: Create ArticleService interface with CRUD + pagination methods
Create ArticleServiceImpl with full business logic
Implement: create, update, delete (logical), getById, page, publish, top

features.description: Article REST controller in adapter layer
steps: Create ArticleController with endpoints: POST /article, PUT /article, DELETE /article/{id}, GET /article/{id}, GET /article/page
All endpoints return AjaxResult<T> with proper auth
Create src/api/article/articleApi.js with all article CRUD methods
Create src/api/article/categoryApi.js with category CRUD methods
Update src/api/index.js to export new modules

features.description: Article list page with pagination and filters
steps: Element Plus table with columns: title, category, status, isTop, viewCount, createTime
Action buttons: create, edit, delete, publish, top
Form fields: title, category, summary, content (textarea), cover image, status
Support both create and edit modes

features.description: Article detail page for viewing a single article
steps: Display full article content with metadata
Show category, status, isTop, viewCount, createTime
Table with category name, sort order, status, article count

features.description: Article route configuration in Vue Router

steps: Frontend dev server starts without errors
Create an article via API and verify in database
List articles via API with pagination
Frontend pages render correctly with Element Plus
